claim_summary: On May 30th, 2024, the plaintiff dined at Central East Asian Cuisine and consumed a Big Plate Whole Chicken that contained small bones, which cracked one of her teeth. The staff apologized, but the pain worsened, leading her to visit a dentist who extracted the tooth. A dental implant was later performed, costing approximately $4500. The plaintiff is seeking compensation for the total cost of dental treatment and emotional stress, totaling $5500.
